shows.title: CULTIVATE Trade Show
shows.address: 400 N High St, Columbus, OH 43215, United States
shows.description: AmericanHort hosts Cultivate—the premier event for the entire green industry—at the Greater Columbus Convention Center, July 11–14, 2026. Growers, retailers, suppliers, and horticulture professionals from across North America gather for education, networking, and a full trade show floor.

shows.title: Garden Center Conference & Expo
shows.address: 2100 West End Avenue, Nashville, TN 37203, United States
shows.description: The Garden Center Conference & Expo is the educational conference and immersive expo for owners, executives, and managers of independent garden centers across North America. Produced by Garden Center magazine / GIE Media, the 2026 edition features education, networking, and an Immersive Garden Center at the Loews Vanderbilt Hotel in Nashville.

shows.title: Canadian Greenhouse Conference
shows.address: 6815 Stanley Avenue, Niagara Falls, Ontario L2G 3Y9, Canada
shows.description: The Canadian Greenhouse Conference is Canada’s foremost event for commercial growers of crops produced in a controlled environment. The two-day conference and trade show attracts growers from across North America and showcases production techniques, research, products, and technology.

shows.title: Green Industry Show & Conference
shows.address: 4847A - 19 Street, Red Deer, AB T4R 2N7, Canada
shows.description: The Green Industry Show & Conference in Red Deer attracts more than 1,200 visitors and over 100 exhibitors from across the landscape, greenhouse, nursery, garden centre, turf, and tree care industries. Attendees get keynotes, educational sessions, and a full trade show at Westerner Park.

shows.title: Québec Vert Trade Show
shows.address: 2670 avenue Beauparlant, Saint-Hyacinthe, QC J2S 4M8, Canada
shows.description: Expo Québec Vert’s commercial expo brings together ornamental horticulture, environmental horticulture, and urban agriculture professionals from across Quebec. Nearly 6,000 attendees and 225+ exhibitors gather at Espace Saint-Hyacinthe for three days of products, education, and networking.

shows.title: HortEast Trade Show
shows.address: 377 Killam Drive, Moncton, NB E1C 3T1, Canada
shows.description: HortEast is Atlantic Canada’s top horticultural conference and trade show (Nov 23–25, 2026 overall; trade show floor Nov 24–25). Industry professionals from landscape, greenhouse, nursery, municipalities, garden centers, lawn care, turf, and golf gather at the Moncton Coliseum.

shows.title: Gulf States Horticultural Expo
shows.venue: Arthur R. Outlaw Mobile Convention Center
shows.address: 1 South Water Street, Mobile, AL 36602, United States
shows.description: The Gulf States Horticultural Expo (GSHE) is the premier winter green-industry trade show of the South. Produced with ALNLA, MNLA, and LNLA, it brings wholesale growers, landscapers, retailers, manufacturers, and distributors together in Mobile. Education sessions are Jan 6; trade show floor is Jan 7–8, 2027.

shows.title: MANTS Trade Show
shows.address: One West Pratt Street, Baltimore, MD 21201, United States
shows.description: MANTS—The Masterpiece of Trade Shows—is the mid-Atlantic green industry’s January gathering at the Baltimore Convention Center. Nursery, landscape, and garden-center professionals meet here every year because MANTS means business.

shows.title: Crop Expo Trade Show
shows.address: 75 Champ Blvd, Manheim, PA 17545, United States
shows.description: Crop Expo is an annual two-day educational trade show for small family farms in greenhouse, nursery, cut flower, and vegetable production across the Mid-Atlantic. Held at Spooky Nook Event Center in Manheim, PA (January 27–28, 2027).

shows.title: CULTIVATE Trade Show
shows.address: 400 N High St, Columbus, OH 43215, United States
shows.description: AmericanHort returns to Columbus for Cultivate 2027 at the Greater Columbus Convention Center (July 10–13, 2027). Jolly Farmer will again exhibit in booth 2216.

shows.title: 10% OFF Fall Liners
shows.description: Order your fall liners by January 15 to get 10% OFF! All of your mum/aster orders that we receive by the early order deadlines will be billed at 10% off the regular price.

shows.title: 10% OFF Summer/Fall Grower Ready Products
shows.description: Order your summer/fall plugs and liners by June 1 to get 10% OFF! All of your summer/fall plug and liner orders that we receive by the early order deadlines will be billed at 10% off the regular price.

shows.title: 10% OFF Grower Ready Liners
shows.description: Order your liners by October 1 to get 10% OFF! All of your winter/spring orders that we receive by the early order deadlines will be billed at 10% off the regular price.

shows.title: 10% OFF Grower Ready Plugs
shows.description: Order your plugs by November 1 to get 10% OFF! All of your winter/spring orders that we receive by the early order deadlines will be billed at 10% off the regular price.

shows.title: 3% OFF — Prepayment Discount
shows.description: Pay for next year's orders by December 31 and save 3%! If you prepay for only a portion of your orders, you can take 3% off the prepaid portion. We do not offer discounts for prepayments via credit card. Can be combined with the 10% Early Order Discount.
